_note: Metal (MoltenVK) gpu-next reference signatures, captured via metal_ref.sh on a static smptehdbars 1280x720 source with the same capture.lua + frame_metrics.py that CI runs on WARP. Compare REGIME, not exact magnitude: fp16-RTZ vs fp32 and per-tick grain RNG make absolute values differ across platforms. A STORAGE/SSBO break shows as WARP leaving the regime (a grain shader going frozen tMAD~0 or exploding; CelFlare failing to converge).
